codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the blocking regression from the prior review. The single remaining `document.getElementById('chainId').value` read in the autocomplete refresh() function (previously at line 4343) is replaced with `getCurrentChainId()`, which reads from `data-chain-id` attribute. A grep of the current codebase confirms zero remaining reads of `#chainId.value` for chain ID extraction purposes — all remaining `.value` reads are either writes (setting display text), search query reads (for dropdown filtering), or within `getCurrentChainId()` itself as fallback parsing. The ARIA combobox/listbox semantics are comprehensive: `role="combobox"` with `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls`, `aria-haspopup` on the input; `role="listbox"` on the dropdown; `role="option"` with `aria-selected` on items; and `aria-activedescendant` management on keyboard navigation. The subsequent UX polish commit (ccf011a) preserves all ARIA attributes. The library note in quick-fixes-scrutiny-notes.md documents the gotcha for future developers.

issues.description: No new unit tests were added for the autocomplete refresh() chain ID resolution. The fix is for existing functionality and existing tests pass, but a targeted test verifying that refresh() uses getCurrentChainId() rather than raw .value would guard against future regressions. Low priority since manual verification confirmed correct behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The prior synthesis already flagged a suggested AGENTS.md convention: 'never read chain ID from #chainId.value; always use getCurrentChainId()'. The fix worker correctly applied this but the AGENTS.md convention has not yet been added. The library note was updated, but AGENTS.md still lacks the explicit rule.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: synthesis.json suggestedGuidanceUpdates[0] recommends AGENTS.md update. Current AGENTS.md (mission) does not mention getCurrentChainId(). The fix correctly applied the pattern and documented it in .factory/library/quick-fixes-scrutiny-notes.md.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fix added ARIA combobox/listbox attributes to the chain dropdown, addressing the prior review's non-blocking ARIA issue. The pattern is now consistent with other interactive elements in the app (settings button has aria-haspopup/aria-expanded, modals have role=dialog). The suggested AGENTS.md accessibility convention from the prior synthesis has not yet been added.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: synthesis.json suggestedGuidanceUpdates[1] recommends ARIA requirement for new interactive widgets. Current AGENTS.md (mission) does not mention ARIA requirements.

summary: PASS — The fix fully addresses the blocking regression from the prior ui-chain-searchable-dropdown review. The single remaining `document.getElementById('chainId').value` read in autocomplete refresh() was replaced with `getCurrentChainId()`. A codebase-wide grep confirms no other chain-ID-as-value reads remain. ARIA combobox/listbox semantics were added comprehensively (combobox, listbox, option roles; aria-expanded, aria-selected, aria-activedescendant management). The subsequent UX polish commit (ccf011a) preserves all fixes. All validators (typecheck, lint, 136 tests) pass. Manual verification confirmed autocomplete works correctly after chain selection. One non-blocking note: no new unit test was added for the specific fix, but existing tests and manual verification cover the behavior.
